name: Labs Institute
description: DJ artist management platform — three tiers (marketing site, owner portal, DJ portal) with AI-driven intelligence layer for self-improvement.

tiers.marketing-site: Public-facing labs.institute — roster showcase, services, proof of value
tiers.owner-portal: Admin dashboard — roster, venues, events, contracts, finances, bookings
tiers.dj-portal: Per-artist dashboard — content, socials, calendar, gig tracker, metrics
tiers.lab-intelligence: AI layer — vector DB, pattern detection, growth roadmaps, improvement suggestions
tiers.lab-wiki: Knowledge base — decisions, learnings, patterns, institutional knowledge
tiers.chat: Founder ↔ DJ communication with AI assistant using Lab-Intelligence + Lab-Wiki context

phases.name: Site Content Builder + Marketing Page
phases.description: Conductor-based intake UI to capture all site content. Output feeds labs.institute build.

phases.name: DJ Profiles + Roster (Owner Portal)
phases.description: DJ profiles with genre, tier, rate card, availability, socials, KPIs. Roster management dashboard.

phases.name: DJ Portal — Content + Calendar
phases.description: Per-DJ dashboard: manage content, social links, gig calendar, track metrics.

phases.name: Contracts + Booking Workflow
phases.description: Contract templates, booking lifecycle (inquiry → quote → contract → confirm), status tracking.

phases.name: Chat + Communication Hub
phases.description: Founder ↔ DJ messaging. AI assistant answers questions from Lab-Wiki + Lab-Intelligence context.

phases.name: Lab-Intelligence — AI Growth Engine
phases.description: Vector DB ingesting gig outcomes, social metrics, campaign results. Generates growth roadmaps, post-mortems, improvement suggestions.

phases.name: Lab-Wiki — Knowledge Base
phases.description: Structured knowledge capture: what works at which venues, optimal pricing, best promo strategies. Searchable by founder and DJs.

phases.name: Pricing Engine
phases.description: Dynamic pricing based on location, event scale, DJ tier, market data. Rate cards per DJ.

phases.name: Marketing + Social Tools
phases.description: Content calendar, cross-platform posting, campaign tracking, audience analytics.

phases.name: Gig Discovery + DJ Matching
phases.description: Event opportunity feed. Match DJs to gigs by genre, location, availability. Application tracking.

phases.name: Financial Management
phases.description: Invoicing, payment tracking, commission calculator, P&L per event and per DJ.
